positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric representation of a fox curled up sleeping within a celestial wreath of constellations and crescent moons. The fox silhouette is deep indigo and rich sepia, outlined by fine gold metallic ink detailing. The background is a gradient of deep navy blue transitioning to twilight purple, filled with delicate, abstract lines mimicking astronomical charts and soft cosmic glow. High contrast, crisp edges, clean lines, vintage tattoo aesthetic combined with modern scientific illustration, centered composition, highly detailed for maximum print visibility, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, low detail, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition, gradient fade, cartoonish, photorealism, logos, trademarks
